input.command:
cd ~/.lcwine
echo "=== prefix contents ==="
ls -la ~/.lcwine/*.reg 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $NF, $5"b"}'
echo
echo "=== [Mac Driver] registry settings (winemac.drv) ==="
awk '/\[Software\\\\Wine\\\\Mac Driver\]/{f=1} f{print} /^$/{if(f>1)exit; if(f)f++}' user.reg 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "--- (system.reg Mac Driver) ---"
grep -A15 'Mac Driver' system.reg 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo
echo "=== [Explorer\\Desktop] — virtual desktop enabled? ==="
grep -iE 'Explorer\\\\Desktops|Explorer\]|Desktop=|\\\\Desktops\]' user.reg system.reg 2>/dev/null | head -10
grep -A5 'Wine\\\\Explorer' user.reg 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo
echo "=== any stored window positions / 'Mac Driver' RetinaMode / capture display ==="
grep -iE 'RetinaMode|CaptureDisplays|UsePresentationMode|OpenGLSurfaceMode|window' user.reg 2>/dev/null | head -10
input.description: Inspect Wine Mac driver and virtual desktop registry settings
